## createPiWsServer() function

Convenience factory that creates a `PiWs`<!-- -->, installs routes, and starts listening.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export declare function createPiWsServer<Session = unknown>(input: {
  config: PiWsOptions<Session>;
  installers?: readonly RouteInstaller[];
}): Promise<RunningServer>;
```

**Returns:**

Promise&lt;[RunningServer](./pi-ws.runningserver.md)<!-- -->&gt;

Running server handle.

## Remarks

Prefer `new PiWs()` when you want to keep a reusable instance around. This helper is useful when a one-shot startup function is enough.
